g.data-label: where does the asset come from?
factory or decorator assigns AutomationCondition directly
Driver A — Asset Daemon ❌ skips this asset (nothing to evaluate)
Driver A — Asset Daemon ✅ evaluates rule every few seconds fires run when TRUE
Driver B — Sensors (cross_partition_sensor, ingestion sensors, …) may fire the asset
Driver C — Schedules cron-driven jobs may fire the asset
